forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 49. South wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of fog before 10am, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 73. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the night wraps its tender cloak around Boston, a gentle veil of fog mingles with the slight chance of rain, weaving an ethereal charm over the city. The air holds a cool crispness, hinting at the warmth that will embrace the day ahead. With temperatures expected to kiss the low fifties overnight, a light jacket and soft layers will make for a comfortable escape into the morning's haze. As dawn breaks, those swaths of fog cling quietly to the path, offering a soft, muted landscape that beckons exploration.

Sunday promises a gentle awakening from this misty slumber, with the promise of mostly cloudy skies and highs nearing a pleasant seventy-three degrees. A loose breeze from the southwest will bring a whisper of warmth, an ideal companion for those emerging from their weekend cocoon. With sturdy shoes and a light wrap in hand, wander along the city's storied streets or perhaps find solace with a book in one of the local parks, the contemplative calm of fog lending itself beautifully to reflection. Embrace the unique character of this day where the ordinary becomes a serene retreat from life’s rush.
